revision.text:
==Japanese Content== [[大分県]][[東国東郡]][[姫島村]]の建築物に関するカテゴリ。 {{citation needed|ひめしまむら}} {{座標一覧}} ==Local Content== {{citation needed|ひめしまむら}} {{座標一覧}} {{translated page|ja|Category:姫島村の建築物|version=98046297}} {{translated page|ja|姫島村の建築物|2=Category:姫島村の建築物|comment=minor fix to get the category to display, cannot get the revision but idk if I even need this just doing it out of OCD and uncertainty over attribution requirements}}
[[ja:Category:姫島村の建築物]] [[sn:This category was created from JA→Wikidata links on Himekoso-sha]] [[Category:Categories missing wikidata]] [[Category:11]] [[Category:Categories missing wikidata]] [[Category:11]] [[Category:Categories missing wikidata but with jawiki]] [[Category:Categories needing translation of Japanese explanatory text]] [[Category:Architecture in Ōita by Municipality]] [[Category:Categories created from jawiki title]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]] [[Category:Himeshima, Oita]] [[Category:jawiki pages with translated titles]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories with no enwiki]] [[Category:Categories]]

revision.comment: Bot: remove [[Category:Categories]] (crud category cleanup)
revision.text:
==Japanese Content== [[大分県]][[東国東郡]][[姫島村]]の建築物に関するカテゴリ。 {{citation needed|ひめしまむら}} {{座標一覧}} ==Local Content== {{citation needed|ひめしまむら}} {{座標一覧}} {{translated page|ja|Category:姫島村の建築物|version=98046297}} {{translated page|ja|姫島村の建築物|2=Category:姫島村の建築物|comment=minor fix to get the category to display, cannot get the revision but idk if I even need this just doing it out of OCD and uncertainty over attribution requirements}}
[[ja:Category:姫島村の建築物]] [[Category:sn_crud|TESTThis category was created from JA→Wikidata links on Himekoso-sha]] [[Category:Categories missing wikidata]] [[Category:Categories missing wikidata]] [[Category:Categories missing wikidata but with jawiki]] [[Category:Categories needing translation of Japanese explanatory text]] [[Category:Architecture in Ōita by Municipality]] [[Category:Categories created from jawiki title]] [[Category:Categories with Japanese origin and translated names]] [[Category:Himeshima, Oita]] [[Category:jawiki pages with translated titles]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories]] [[Category:Tier 1 Categories with no enwiki]] [[Category:Categories missing Wikidata with Japanese interwikis]]

revision.comment: Removing from [[Category:Categories created from jawiki title]] using [[c:Help:Cat-a-lot|Cat-a-lot]]
revision.text:
==Japanese Content== [[大分県]][[東国東郡]][[姫島村]]の建築物に関するカテゴリ。 {{citation needed|ひめしまむら}} {{座標一覧}} ==Local Content== {{citation needed|ひめしまむら}} {{座標一覧}} {{translated page|ja|Category:姫島村の建築物|version=98046297}} {{translated page|ja|姫島村の建築物|2=Category:姫島村の建築物|comment=minor fix to get the category to display, cannot get the revision but idk if I even need this just doing it out of OCD and uncertainty over attribution requirements}}
